diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -115,16 +115,23 @@
         # Remove fc layer

         del self.backbone

         

-        # ASPP module

+        # Channel dimensions for ResNet50:

+        # layer1 output: 256 channels

+        # layer2 output: 512 channels

+        # layer3 output: 1024 channels

+        # layer4 output: 2048 channels

+        

+        # ASPP module - takes 2048 channels from layer4

         self.aspp = ASPP(2048)  # 2048 is the number of channels in layer4 output

         

-        # Decoder

+        # Decoder - takes 256 channels from layer1

         self.decoder = Decoder(num_classes, low_level_channels=256)  # 256 is the number of channels in layer1 output

         

     def forward(self, x):

         # Encoder path

         x0 = self.layer0(x)  # [batch, 64, H/2, W/2]

-        x1 = self.layer1(self.maxpool(x0))  # [batch, 256, H/4, W/4]

+        x = self.maxpool(x0)  # [batch, 64, H/4, W/4]

+        x1 = self.layer1(x)  # [batch, 256, H/4, W/4]

         x2 = self.layer2(x1)  # [batch, 512, H/8, W/8]

         x3 = self.layer3(x2)  # [batch, 1024, H/16, W/16]

         x4 = self.layer4(x3)  # [batch, 2048, H/32, W/32]

@@ -136,6 +143,6 @@
         x = self.decoder(x, x1)  # x1 has shape [batch, 256, H/4, W/4]

         

         # Upsample to original size

-        x = F.interpolate(x, size=(x0.shape[-2]*2, x0.shape[-1]*2), mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)

+        x = F.interpolate(x, size=x0.shape[-2:], scale_factor=2, mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)

         

         return x
